name: Eirlys Home Apartment Phu Quoc - Firework & Ocean View

address.street: Khu căn hộ Sun Grand City Hillside Residence, khu phố 6, đặc khu Phú Quốc, An Thoi

description:
Beachfront Living: Eirlys Home Apartment Phu Quoc in Phu Quoc offers direct beachfront access with a private beach area. Guests can relax by the rooftop swimming pool or enjoy the serene garden terrace.

Comfortable Accommodations: The apartment features air-conditioning, a kitchenette, balcony, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include bathrobes, streaming services, washing machine, and a work desk.

Convenient Location: Located 12 mi from Phu Quoc International Airport, the property is near attractions such as Phu Quoc Prison (8.7 mi) and Vinpearl Land Phu Quoc (29 mi). Free off-site private parking is available.
excerpt: Beachfront Living: Eirlys Home Apartment Phu Quoc offers direct beachfront access with a private beach area, rooftop swimming pool, and garden terrace.
highlights: Top Location: Highly rated by recent guests
